commit_scope: Add a bounded Form-native model data sharing floor.

commands: coord claim model-data-sharing-floor "Remaining fourth wall lane: add bounded Form-native model data sharing receipt; avoid ML execution/router/mesh transport and BML compiler lanes."

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/cell-sync.fk form-stdlib/slice-update-roundtrip.fk form-stdlib/slice-merge.fk form-stdlib/model-data-sharing.fk form-stdlib/tests/model-data-sharing-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Focused validate returned `core.fk+cell-sync.fk+slice-update-roundtrip.fk+slice-merge.fk+model-data-sharing.fk+model-data-sharing-band.fk -> 4095` with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The fourth-arm gate returned `PASS-4WAY  model-data-sharing`. Wellness reported no attention items.

ci_validation.notes: No push or PR yet for this lane.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested; this is a local Form runtime floor.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Model data sharing now has a bounded fourth-kernel receipt for missing-slice request, re-address verification, apply, substrate source authority, and deterministic merge.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/cell-sync.fk form-stdlib/slice-update-roundtrip.fk form-stdlib/slice-merge.fk form-stdlib/model-data-sharing.fk form-stdlib/tests/model-data-sharing-band.fk

phase_gate.gate: Model data sharing needs a composed receipt before live mesh transport, durable query, optimizer deltas, privacy, or conflict policy can be claimed as first-class.
phase_gate.next: Add chunk-range slice policy, optimizer-state delta rows, durable eval query, live mesh slice transport, and privacy/conflict receipts as separate bounded lanes.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Slice update roundtrip and deterministic slice merge were proven separately, while the model-data-sharing wall still lacked one composed receipt and a source-of-truth guard.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: model-data-sharing returns 4095 four-way and is admitted to form/fourth-arm-bands.txt.
